The '''deadly laigrek''' was a [[Subspecies/Legends|subspecies]] of [[laigrek]] that was native to the [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. They were similar in appearance to their [[Insect/Legends|insect]] brethren, however they possessed tougher [[Exoskeleton|armor]] that could endure high temperatures, as well as the ability to breathe short streams of fire. Deadly laigreks were found in the subterranean areas of the hilly regions of the planet, however by [[3951 BBY]], a number of them had migrated to the sublevel of the bombed-out [[Jedi Enclave]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
